<@1131790839291596841> Goodnight Goya

I had an idea, so me and <@337996612057956365> are putting together a spreadsheet with help from the rest of the PT-BR (and some PT) community, who've been sharing their biggest doubts, to help out new players.

This whole thing came up because of that recent drama with some content creators. I'm not here to talk about that, but when the glossary got taken down, we realized we should probably make our own thing to help our community.

We've noticed that the Brazilian community kind of depends on content from other countries. Like, if someone over there has a fight, it ends up affecting us too. So yeah, we're kinda held hostage by that, just a figure of speech, lol.

So we started gathering guides and info and translating them ourselves into Brazilian Portuguese. Most of us speak English, but we want to make sure everyone feels included. Plus, honestly? The in-game PT-BR translation is incomprehensible most of the time. Not blaming the devs, we get that stuff's complicated, but maybe this could even help with the translation, and we're glad if you can use and incorporate any of it.

We'd love it if you could pin this guide in the Portuguese channel. We're not trying to copy other spreadsheets, we just want to take the basics, adapt them over time, and offer a more neutral, community-focused version.

If you think we should add references or tweak stuff to avoid drama, we're totally open to that. Our goal is just to help the community, especially since we don't have many BR content creators right now. No drama intended.


https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1yvAckXdL4EN4qd_l12eN7yVhIksCbujQCHvvcVexsHM/edit?usp=sharing
